data.name: Milf Diner Sim
data.detailed_description:
She came to you desperate. She'll leave devoted.

Martha Henderson is a God-fearing woman with a warm smile, a husband who adores her, and $112,000 in debt she can't explain. When the collection notices arrived, she had nowhere else to turn, except to you. A wealthy vampire incubus, who owns multiple companies. A diner on the edge of town, and the loan company that has driven her to you, a generous business man.

What she doesn't know is that you've been watching the Henderson family for a very long time. You're not just her employer. You're something ancient, something hungry, and something patient. A vampire incubus who's spent centuries learning that the sweetest corruption is the kind that feels like salvation.

Now Martha works your diner. She takes orders, wipes down tables, and tells herself this is temporary. But every shift chips away at the woman she used to be. Every private moment in the back office tests boundaries she swore were sacred. And somewhere between the lunch rush and closing time, she'll discover that the debt she owes can't be paid in dollars.

Will you break her faith, or make her worship you instead?

Gameplay Features

  • Manage Your Diner — Run a fully functional restaurant simulation. Set her schedule, upgrade equipment, and build a thriving business that serves as the perfect cover for your darker appetites. Balance the books by day; collect on debts by night.

  • Deep Character Customization — Dress Martha for every occasion. Modest waitress attire, revealing waitress uniforms, or something far more degrading. Watch her appearance evolve as her corruption deepens, or keep her looking innocent while her mind shatters.

  • Branching Corruption System — Every interaction shapes Martha's transformation. Push her toward shameless depravity or mold her into a devoted servant who believes submission is love. Multiple corruption paths lead to dramatically different outcomes.

  • Dynamic Relationship Mechanics — Your choices ripple outward. Corrupt Martha's church friends. Manipulate her oblivious husband. When her stepdaughter arrives to investigate, decide whether she becomes your next project or your newest obstacle.

  • Supernatural Powers — You are the Lustborne. Your touch brings pleasure. Your presence erodes willpower. Use ancient abilities to accelerate corruption or savor the slow unraveling of a woman who thought her faith would protect her.

  • Environmental Storytelling — The diner, Martha's home, the church, the mansion, each location offers unique opportunities for corruption. What happens in the walk-in freezer stays in the walk-in freezer.

  • Multiple Endings — Will Martha remain faithful to her husband while secretly serving you? Will she abandon everything to become your immortal thrall? Will her family discover the truth—and will it matter by then?

Features

  • Manage Your Diner

  • Deep Character Customization

  • Branching Corruption System

  • Dynamic Relationship Mechanics

  • Supernatural Powers

  • Environmental Storytelling

  • Multiple Endings

data.short_description: A debt drives a desperate religious MILF to your mysterious establishment. Manage your shady diner. Customize her look. Corrupt her as you guide her down of path becoming a sex slave or devoted lover. Every choice shapes your dark relationship. What will you make of her?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
